title: Morning Supplication
arabic: اللّهُـمَّ بِكَ أَصْـبَحْنا وَبِكَ أَمْسَـينا ، وَبِكَ نَحْـيا وَبِكَ نَمُـوتُ وَإِلَـيْكَ النُّـشُور
transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya wa bika namootu wa ilaykan-nushoor.
translation: O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the morning and by Your leave we have reached the evening, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our resurrection.

title: When mounting a vehicle
arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
transliteration: Subhanal-ladhee sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrimeen. Wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqaliboon.
translation: Glory be to Him Who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it (by our efforts). And verily, to Our Lord we indeed are to return!

title: Before sleeping
arabic: بِاسْمِكَ رَبِّي وَضَعْتُ جَنْبِي وَبِكَ أَرْفَعُهُ
transliteration: Bismika Rabbee wada'tu janbee wa bika arfa'uhu.
translation: In Your name my Lord, I lie down and in Your name I rise.

title: When experiencing distress
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
transliteration: La ilaha illa Anta subhanaka inni kuntu minadh-dhalimeen.
translation: There is none worthy of worship but You, glory is to You. Surely, I was among the wrongdoers.
